transcript: All I wanted to say was simply hello But the mistakes that I made Too late, I'm afraid But to forget love never ceases It never ceases Hey, you got a light? Don't smoke. I didn't let you win. I'm a superhero? Can I give you a ride somewhere? No. Hey! You sure don't want to ride. I mean, I'm going this way anyway. Oh, my God. We just need to prepare us now. Told you. Jack Told ya Dick
